peaceful.label: Peaceful
peaceful.desc: No enemies. Explore and build freely.

solo.label: Solo Combat
solo.desc: Fight enemies solo. Wave defense rules apply.

coop_build.label: Co-op Build
coop_build.desc: Build together via LAN sync. No wave enemies.

$meta.note: Keyed by id. scalingFactor multiplies enemy HP/damage each wave in wave_defense. mpSync enables LAN state broadcast.
